title: Oil rises as Iran-U.S. deadlocked peace talks fan fears of extended supply disruption
summary: Trump's weekend warning to Iran signals potential escalation of the Washington-Tehran impasse over ending the war. The threat of resumed armed conflict is fueling fears of extended crude supply disruption, which is pushing oil prices higher.
content: Trump's warning to Iran over the weekend signals that the impasse between Washington and Tehran over ending the war could deteriorate into resumption of armed conflict.

zh.title: 随着伊朗-美国和平谈判陷入僵局引发供应中断担忧，油价上升
zh.summary: 特朗普周末对伊朗的警告预示华盛顿-德黑兰在结束战争问题上的对峙可能升级。重启武装冲突的威胁引发了人们对长期原油供应中断的担忧，推高了油价。

title: Dow futures slip, oil prices push higher as Iran war remains stuck in stalemate
summary: U.S. stock futures fell while crude prices surged on Sunday, extending the previous week's volatility. The market's recent rally stalled as the Iran war remains deadlocked, with oil supply concerns driving the divergent trading patterns.
content: U.S. stock-index futures fell and crude prices rose on Sunday, after the market’s rally stalled last week as oil prices rose sharply amid the impasse in the war with Iran.

zh.title: 随着伊朗战争陷入僵局，道琼斯期货下跌，油价上升
zh.summary: 美国股指期货周日下跌，而原油价格飙升，延续了前一周的波动性。随着伊朗战争陷入僵局，市场近期涨势停滞，油价供应担忧推动了交易模式分化。

title: Asia-Pacific markets fall as Trump’s Iran warning stokes fresh oil supply fears
summary: Asia-Pacific markets declined following Trump's direct warning to Iran to "get moving, FAST." Renewed geopolitical tensions over the unresolved conflict are intensifying concerns about oil supply stability in the region.
content: Asia-Pacific markets fell as investors weighed renewed geopolitical tensions after Donald Trump warned Iran to "get moving, FAST."

zh.title: 亚太市场下跌，特朗普对伊朗的警告引发新的油价供应担忧
zh.summary: 亚太市场在特朗普直接警告伊朗"快速行动"后下跌。未解决冲突引发的地缘政治紧张局势加剧了对该地区油价供应稳定性的担忧。
